name: mitm-proxy-extension
description: Android MITM security testing - ADB certificate injection + proxy capture with professional UI

mitmProxy.windowsRuntimePath.description: Optional local Windows runtime directory. Point this to the extracted runtime directory, or to a parent directory containing runtime/. This takes precedence over archive and URL settings.

mitmProxy.windowsRuntimeArchivePath.description: Optional local Windows runtime zip path. The extension extracts this archive into global storage when the runtime is missing or invalid. This takes precedence over windowsRuntimeUrl.

mitmProxy.windowsRuntimeUrl.description: URL for the internal Windows runtime zip. Used when no local runtime path or archive path is configured.

mitmProxy.windowsRuntimeSha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum for the Windows runtime zip. Leave empty to skip checksum validation.

mitmProxy.windowsRuntimeVersion.description: Expected Windows runtime version. Changing this value forces the extension to install that runtime version.

commands.title: MITM Proxy: Push Certificate to Device
